use_codes.desc: INDICATED AS ADJUNCTIVE THERAPY FOR THE TREATMENT OF PARTIAL-ONSET SEIZURES, PRIMARY GENERALIZED TONIC-CLONIC SEIZURES, AND SEIZURES ASSOCIATED WITH LENNOX-GASTAUT SYNDROME IN PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
INDICATED AS INITIAL MONOTHERAPY FOR THE TREATMENT OF PARTIAL-ONSET OR PRIMARY GENERALIZED TONIC-CLONIC SEIZURES IN PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
INDICATED FOR THE PREVENTIVE TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE IN PATIENTS 12 YEARS AND OLDER

indications.text:
7.2 Other Carbonic Anhydrase Inhibitors
1.1 Monotherapy Epilepsy
7.3 CNS Depressants
1.2 Adjunctive Therapy Epilepsy
7.4 Oral Contraceptives
1.3 Migraine
7.5 Hydrochlorothiazide (HCTZ)

1.1 Monotherapy Epilepsy
EPRONTIA is indicated as initial monotherapy for the treatment of partial-onset or primary generalized
tonic-clonic seizures in patients 2 years of age and older.
